expression:
CASE
        WHEN r.resolution_status IN ('resolved', 'not_applicable')
            THEN 'RESOLVED'
        WHEN r.resolution_status IN (
                'could_not_resolve', 'escalated_to_analyst'
            )
            THEN 'PENDING'
        WHEN r.resolution_status IS NULL THEN 'PENDING'
        ELSE 'AMBIGUOUS'
    END

CASE
        WHEN m.material_group = 'CPE-RTR' THEN 'Router'
        WHEN m.material_group = 'CPE-ONT' THEN 'ONT'
        WHEN m.material_group = 'CPE-STB' THEN 'Set-Top Box'
        WHEN m.material_group = 'CPE-SWT' THEN 'Switch'
        WHEN m.material_group = 'CPE-MDM' THEN 'Modem'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END
ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.lifecycle_status = 'deployed' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 1)
ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.lifecycle_status = 'defective' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2)
ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.lifecycle_status = 'returned' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2)

CASE
        WHEN 100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.lifecycle_status = 'defective' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) > 5 THEN 'RED'
        WHEN 100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.lifecycle_status = 'defective' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) > 3 THEN 'YELLOW'
        ELSE 'GREEN'
    END

CASE
        WHEN 100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.lifecycle_status = 'returned' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) > 10 THEN 'RED'
        WHEN 100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN e.lifecycle_status = 'returned' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) > 5 THEN 'YELLOW'
        ELSE 'GREEN'
    END

CASE
        WHEN fi.unrestricted_stock = 0 AND fi.total_stock = 0 THEN 'ZERO_STOCK'
        WHEN fi.blocked_stock > 0 THEN 'BLOCKED_STOCK'
        WHEN fi.unrestricted_stock > 5000 THEN 'EXCESS_STOCK'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END

CASE
        WHEN fi.unrestricted_stock = 0 AND fi.total_stock = 0 THEN 'RED'
        WHEN fi.blocked_stock > 0 THEN 'YELLOW'
        WHEN fi.unrestricted_stock > 5000 THEN 'YELLOW'
        ELSE 'GREEN'
    END

CASE
        WHEN fi.unrestricted_stock = 0 AND fi.total_stock = 0
            THEN 'No stock available — check if reorder triggered'
        WHEN fi.blocked_stock > 0
            THEN 'Blocked stock present — may need quality review'
        WHEN fi.unrestricted_stock > 5000
            THEN 'Unusually high stock — check for over-ordering'
        ELSE 'Stock levels normal'
    END

CASE

CASE h.movement_type
        WHEN '101' THEN 'goods_receipt'

Cost center (KOSTL) charged for the PO line, from sat_po_account.
Quantity ordered on the PO line (EKPO.MENGE).
Per-unit price on the PO line (EKPO.NETPR).
Net value of the PO line in document currency (EKPO.NETWR).
PO transaction currency code (EKKO.WAERS).
Total goods-receipt quantity for this PO line, summed from BWART='101' postings only (excludes 102 reversals).
Received quantity × unit_price — economic value actually delivered against the PO line.
Vendor-committed delivery date from sat_po_schedule (EKET.EINDT).
Date of the earliest goods receipt against this PO (any line). Anchor for lead-time and OTD calculations.
BG013 classification: pending (no GR yet), partially_received (received < ordered), fully_received (received >= ordered).
BG001: days from po_date to first_gr_date (NULL if no GR yet).
BG002: TRUE if first_gr_date <= scheduled_delivery_date + 2-day tolerance.
BG008: days from purchase requisition date to po_date.
Purchase requisition creation date (EBAN.BADAT).
PO header processing status (EKKO.PROCSTAT) — open / approved / blocked etc.
PO document type (EKKO.BSART), e.g. NB=standard, FO=framework, UB=stock transfer.
Purchasing organization (EKORG) responsible for the PO.
Purchasing group (EKGRP) — buyer team within the purchasing org.
SAP user who created the PO header (EKKO.ERNAM).

expression:
CASE WHEN qt.quarter_total_spend > 0
        THEN ROUND(vq.total_spend / qt.quarter_total_spend, 4)
        ELSE 0
    END
transformation_chain:
SUM(f.net_value);SUM(total_spend);CASE WHEN qt.quarter_total_spend > 0
        THEN ROUND(vq.total_spend / qt.quarter_total_spend, 4)
        ELSE 0
    END
transformation_chain_plain: Total net value per vendor;Total spend per vendor per quarter;Vendor's share of quarterly spend
description: BG014: vendor's total_spend divided by quarter-wide total spend (0..1).

expression:
CASE WHEN qt.quarter_total_spend > 0
        AND (vq.total_spend / qt.quarter_total_spend) > 0.60
        THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE
    END
transformation_chain:
SUM(f.net_value);SUM(total_spend);CASE WHEN qt.quarter_total_spend > 0
        AND (vq.total_spend / qt.quarter_total_spend) > 0.60
        THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE
    END
transformation_chain_plain: Total spend per vendor per quarter;Total spend across all vendors per quarter;Vendor exceeds 60% of quarterly spend
description: BG010: TRUE when vendor_spend_share > 0.60 in the quarter.

expression:
CASE WHEN vq.total_ordered_qty > 0
        THEN ROUND(vq.total_received_qty / vq.total_ordered_qty, 4)
        ELSE 0
    END
transformation_chain:
SUM(f.ordered_quantity);CASE WHEN vq.total_ordered_qty > 0
        THEN ROUND(vq.total_received_qty / vq.total_ordered_qty, 4)
        ELSE 0
    END
transformation_chain_plain: Total units ordered from vendor;Vendor fulfillment rate as received vs ordered
description: BG015: total_received_qty / total_ordered_qty for the quarter (0..1).
